_meta.description: Tool Ready dependency spec — defines per-tool system dependencies, detection methods, and install strategies. Edit this JSON to add new tool support without code changes.

tool_entry.aliases: Cross-framework tool name mapping. Cosh/openclaw/hermes use different tool names; aliases collect all variants for reverse lookup.
tool_entry.required: Hard dependencies. Any missing → NOT_READY, triggers auto-fix.
tool_entry.recommended: Soft dependencies. Missing → PARTIAL. System tools (git, docker, cargo, uv) are shell-invoked, grouped under Shell.
tool_entry.config_files: Required config file paths (~ expansion supported). Missing → PARTIAL.
tool_entry.permissions: Required system permissions: file_read, file_write, exec_shell. Missing → NOT_READY. Install readiness only, not runtime state.
tool_entry.network: Removed. Network connectivity is runtime state, not install readiness.

dep_entry.binary: CLI tool name for command -v detection
dep_entry.apt_package: Override package name when detected manager is apt (Debian/Ubuntu). Optional; defaults to package.
dep_entry.apk_package: Override package name when detected manager is apk (Alpine). Optional; defaults to package.
dep_entry.manager: Package manager type. Default rpm (auto-detects yum/dnf/apt/apk at runtime)
dep_entry.use_npx: Whether to use npx for execution
dep_entry.fallback: Fallback install strategies, tried sequentially on primary failure

supported_managers.rpm: System package manager (auto-detects yum/dnf/apt-get/apk by runtime environment)
supported_managers.uv: uv tool install / uv pip install — modern Python package manager
supported_managers.curl_pipe_sh: curl/wget | sh — official install script (fallback only)

_meta.categories: 4 agent tool categories: Shell/WebFetch/Read/Write. System tools (git, docker, cargo, uv) invoked via shell → grouped under Shell.recommended.

Shell._description: Shell — base command execution environment for AI agents

WebFetch._description: WebFetch — web request tool for AI agents

Read._description: Read — file read and search tool for AI agents

Write._description: Write — file write and edit tool for AI agents
